zh.lifeSummary: Margart Weston是Henry , Esq. De Weston的女兒，出生。她和John de Eton至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margart Weston是Henry , Esq. De Weston的女儿，出生。她和John de Eton至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Weston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Weston, from Old English west ‘west’ + tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

topographic name from Middle English atte west tun(e) ‘at the west farmstead, settlement’ (Old English west + tūn), or from Middle English (bi) weste(n)tune (Old English be westan tūne or be west in tūne), denoting someone who lived either to the west of a settlement or in the western part of a settlement. The latter was a common surname in Sussex.

variants.name: Wesson
meanings: English (Midlands and Kent): variant of   Weston  .
History: John Wesson came from England to Salem, MA, in 1644.

nameMeanings.name: Margart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: Margart Weston was born as the daughter of Henry , Esq. De Weston. She had at least 1 son with John de Eton.

de.lifeSummary: Margart Weston wurde, als Tochter von Henry , Esq. De Weston geboren. Sie hatte mit John de Eton mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Margart Weston è nata il come figlia di Henry , Esq. De Weston. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John de Eton.

ja.lifeSummary: Margart WestonはHenry , Esq. De Westonの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn de Etonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Margart Weston(은)는 Henry , Esq. De Weston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John de Eton(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margart Weston nasceu filha de Henry , Esq. De Weston. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John de Eton.

ru.lifeSummary: Margart Weston родилась. Её отца звали Henry , Esq. De Weston. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John de Eton.
